mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Our Priority!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this, I waltz into my usual coffee spot, fully expecting the barista to have my order ready before I even reach the counter. But oh no, today was different. There was a line! A line, can you believe it? As I wait, tapping my foot impatiently, I finally reach the front, only to find they'd run out of my favorite non-dairy milk. The nerve! I demanded to see the manager, and after a heated exchange, they rush out to buy a carton just for me. Victory tastes so much sweeter with a touch of entitlement, don't you think?
